changelog:
## What's Changed

### 🚀 Features
- In-app crash log viewer (CrashLogActivity)
- Per-app profile management (ProfileListActivity)
- Block log auto-prune at 1000 entries
- Battery optimization exemption prompt
- Safe mode with crash counting (3 strikes)
- Quick toggle pause/resume with notification controls
- LSPosed pause sync via config flag
- Onboarding wizard (first-run)
- Haptic feedback on toggles
- Config validation before save
- Region preview colors

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- CrashLogActivity now properly reads crash logs (reportCrash() writes detailed stack traces)
- ProfileListActivity uses correct config path (not hardcoded)
- LSPosed Xposed hook respects pause state
- ConfigFileObserver API 29+ lint fix
- CI builds with assembleDebug instead of assembleRelease

### ♻️ Refactoring
- CrashLogActivity + ProfileListActivity UI rewritten with Material Components
- ConfigFileObserver with inotify + polling fallback
- AccessibilityService pause/resume with notification actions
- Block counter in overlay + notification

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 100 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
